=== RUN-CLAUDE.SH ===
#!/bin/bash

CONTINUE=""
if [ "$1" = "--continue" ]; then
    CONTINUE="--continue"
    shift
fi

PROMPT="$1"
WORKDIR="${2:-/mnt/nextcloud/OpenClaw}"

mkdir -p "$WORKDIR"
cd "$WORKDIR" || exit 1

OUTPUT=$(env -u CLAUDECODE claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print $CONTINUE "$PROMPT" 2>&1)

echo "$OUTPUT"

=== OPENCLAW VERSION ===
OpenClaw 2026.6.5 (5181e4f)
